name: Simple Hamburger Stroganoff
directions: Brown ground beef.
Add salt and pepper to taste and chopped onion.
Next, add dry onion soup mix, 1/2-1 cup water.
Stir in sour cream and sauce.
Stir in chopped mushroom.
Add salt, garlic salt and pepper to desired taste.
Simmer for about 1/2 hour.
Serve over 2 cups cooked and drained wide egg noodles.
Serves approximately 5-6.

name: 'Lighter' Hamburger Stroganoff
directions: Melt butter in large nonstick skillet; add wine and onions; cook until soft.
Remove from skillet, set aside.
Add meat to skillet; cook thoroughly.
Stir in flour.
Slowly add broth while stirring.
Add onion and drained mushrooms.
Cook over med-low until thickened, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat; add sour cream and heat through.
Serve over cooked noodles.

similar.name: Super Easy and Tasty Beef Stroganoff

name: Easy Stroganoff
directions: Cook ground beef; drain.
Add all ingredients except the sour cream.
Cook down.
Mix in sour cream right before serving.
Serve over rice or egg noodles.

name: Easy Reduced Fat Beef Stroganoff
directions: Brown the hamburger, onion, bell pepper, and garlic in a large saucepan.
Drain.
Add soup, milk, worcestershire, sour cream, salt, and pepper.
Heat through.
Serve over noodles or rice.
You can also add a can of mushrooms, drained, or slice some fresh ones and cook them along with the hamburger-bell pepper saute.

similar.name: Super Easy and Tasty Beef Stroganoff

name: Super Easy and Tasty Beef Stroganoff
directions: Cut the steak into 2 1/2 inch strips.
Coat the steak with flour and brown the meat in batches in the butter in a large skillet stirring occasionally.
Add the salt, pepper, water, and cover and simmer for 45 minutes or until the meat is almost tender stirring occasionally.
Stir in the soup and simmer uncovered for 30 minutes or until the meat is tender.
Stir in the sour cream and milk cook until heated through.
Serve over the hot noodles.

name: Hearty Beef Stroganoff
directions: Combine flour,salt and pepper; coat meat.
Melt 1/2 cup butter in frying pan: brown meat on both sides.
Add garlic to taste, onion and mushrooms (more if you like); fry until onion is golden.
Move meat and vegetables to one side (or keep warm in separate pan). To other side of pan blend together 4 TBS butter and 3 TBS flour,
Add tomato paste and beef broth; mix well with meat and vegetables.
Cook until thickened. Add sour cream and heat through; simmer but do not boil.
Sprinkle with parsley.

similar.name: Super Easy and Tasty Beef Stroganoff

name: Speedy Beef Stroganoff
directions: Saute meat, onions, and garlic in a hot skillet about 5 minutes, until meat is browned.
If using raw mushrooms, add them now, and cook until they are soft.
Stir in flour and seasonings. Cook a minute or two so the flour won't taste raw.
Gradually stir in the milk.
Add the soup and, if you are using canned mushrooms, add them now, too. Heat through.
Stir in sour cream and heat but do not boil.
Add a little more milk to adjust consistency, if desired.
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Serve on hot rice or noodles.

similar.name: Super Easy and Tasty Beef Stroganoff

name: 5-Ingredient Beef Stroganoff
directions: Brown ground beef in a medium skillet over medium high heat until thoroughly cooked, drain. Add gravy and mushrooms to the skillet, simmer for 1 minute, stirring occasionally. Stir in sour cream, serve immediately over noodles. You could easily add a small chopped onion and a clove of garlic to the beef while you cook it to add a little more flavor.
